_readme: This file documents every configurable field.
To apply changes in the browser, keep cv-config.js in sync

colors._comment: All hex values. 'accent' = teal highlight, 'amber' = numbers/awards.

_comment: mono = monospace font used for code blocks, headings, and prompts.
sans = sans-serif font used for body paragraphs.
googleFonts = full Google Fonts CSS URL. Update this when changing font families.
Example mono swap: 'Fira Code' -> mono: "'Fira Code', monospace"
Example sans swap: 'DM Sans'   -> sans: "'DM Sans', sans-serif"
Controls the order sections appear on each page.
page1 valid IDs: hero | about | metrics | stack
page2 valid IDs: flagships | others | experience | closing
Removing an ID hides that section. Duplicating is not supported.

about._comment: para1 and para2 accept inline HTML (bold, span with class). headline and footer also accept HTML.
about.headline: I build multiplayer games that players keep coming back to — and the full infrastructure to run them.
about.para1: I founded Deep Monolith, a boutique studio shipping competitive live service card games backed by Microsoft, Sony (Soneium), Iskra, SEI, Startale and Quickload. We’ve built branded gaming campaigns that drew 10,000+ concurrent players inside a Roblox world, and educational games commissioned by CNR — Italy’s National Research Council.
about.para2: My stack: Unity for client and gameplay, Nakama + Go for backend, AWS + Terraform for infrastructure. I design the systems that make live service games work — matchmaking, ranking ladders, seasonal content, Battle Pass, quest systems, game economies — then operate them post-launch using telemetry.
about.footer: // Most engineers pick a lane. I own the whole road.

closing._comment: line1 accepts inline HTML. line2 is plain text. email used in both the mail command and the mailto href.
closing.line1: // Open to senior or lead roles in live service multiplayer.
closing.line2: // Remote or Turin-based. I own verticals — client to cloud, design to live ops.
